parsed.production_notes: The video features a real human actor in natural environments like a car and a salon. Lighting, camera movement, and facial expressions are natural and consistent with smartphone vlog-style recording.

characters.appearance: Young woman, slim build, fair complexion, long dark wavy hair. She has a clear face with minimal makeup.
characters.wardrobe: Bright pink zip-up hoodie over a white top. Gold rings on her fingers.

scenes.setting: Inside a car, daytime, light leather interior.

panels.panel_visual_description: A young woman sits in the driver's seat of a car with light beige leather interior. The car's sunroof is open, revealing green trees outside. She wears a bright pink zip-up hoodie over a white top, and has tortoiseshell sunglasses resting on top of her long, dark wavy hair. She looks directly at the camera with a slightly surprised expression, holding one hand up near her face. The lighting is natural, soft daylight.

scenes.visual_description: A young woman is recording a selfie video in her car. She is wearing a pink hoodie and has sunglasses on her head. Text overlays appear on screen as she speaks.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character A says: No, because why did my nail tech actually just tell me I speak perfect Spanish?
scenes.on_screen_text: The way she looked at me after I answered in Spanish 😭

scenes.setting: Brightly lit nail salon, white walls, modern light fixtures.

panels.panel_visual_description: A young woman with long dark wavy hair is seated in a brightly lit room with white walls and ceiling. A modern, curved gold light fixture hangs above her. She wears a bright pink zip-up hoodie. The camera angle is slightly low, framing her face and shoulders. She is looking off-camera to her right with a wide, genuine smile, appearing engaged in a happy conversation. The lighting is bright and even.

scenes.visual_description: The woman is in a salon, looking off-camera and smiling as she converses with someone unseen. The camera angle is slightly low. Subtitles appear on screen translating the conversation.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: ¿Cómo le va? [How's it going?]
Unknown speaker says: Bien. [Good.]
Character A says: Qué bueno que todas hablan español. Tengo que practicar. [How great that you all speak Spanish. I need to practice.]
Unknown speaker says: Pero hablas perfecto. [But you speak perfectly.]
Character A says: ¿Hablo perfecto? [I talk perfectly?]
Unknown speaker says: No siempre! [Not always!]
Unknown speaker says: Se te entiende todo clarito. [We understand you so clearly.]
Character A says: Ay, muchas gracias. Es que uso una aplicación que se llama Speak para ayudarme. ¿Has escuchado de Duolingo? Pero no hace lo mismo. No da lo mismo. [Aw, thanks so much! I use this app called Speak to help me. You've heard of Duolingo, but it doesn't do too well. It doesn't do the same.]
Unknown speaker says: Muy bien, te entendemos, pero perfecto. [Very good because we understand you perfectly.]
Character A says: No, métanse en la app que se llama Speak para que aprendan inglés también. [No, seriously, get on the app called Speak to learn more English too.]
Unknown speaker says: ¿Sí? [Really?]
Character A says: Sí, sí ayuda. [Yes, it really helps!]
scenes.on_screen_text:
How's it going?
Good.
How great that you all speak Spanish.
I need to practice!
But you speak perfectly.
I talk perfectly?
Not always!
We understand you so clearly.
Aw, thanks so much!
I use this app called Speak to help me.
You've heard of Duolingo
but it doesn't do too well.
It doesn't do the same.
Very good because we understand you perfectly.
No, seriously, get on the app called Speak to learn more English too.
Really?
Yes, it really helps!

scenes.setting: Inside a car, daytime, light leather interior.

panels.panel_visual_description: A young woman sits in the driver's seat of a car with light beige leather interior and an open sunroof. She wears a bright pink zip-up hoodie over a white top. Her long dark wavy hair falls around her shoulders. She looks directly at the camera, her hands clasped together in front of her chest as if emphasizing a point. Her expression is earnest and engaged. The lighting is natural daylight.

scenes.visual_description: The woman is back in her car, recording another selfie video. She gestures with her hands as she speaks directly to the camera. No text overlays are present in this shot.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character A says: I swear I used to freeze up when I used to have to speak Spanish and now I don't. So anyways, yeah, I've been using Speak to practice my Spanish so I don't embarrass myself in times like those.

panels.panel_visual_description: A completely solid, vibrant blue background fills the entire frame. There are no objects, people, textures, or gradients visible. The color is uniform and flat.

scenes.visual_description: A solid blue screen with white text displaying the app name and a call to action.
